ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (FEMALE or MALE) */,
  "disease_status" TEXT /* Disease status of the patient (alive, alive with metastases, etc.) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient (e.g., non-smoker, smoker, former smoker) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption habits of the patient */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of breast cancer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tumors" (
  "tumor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tumor */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the tumor belongs to */,
  "tumor_size" INTEGER /* Size of the tumor */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade of the tumor */,
  "tumor_location" TEXT /* Location of the tumor */,
  "date_of_diagnosis" TEXT /* Date when the tumor was diagnosed */,
  "biopsy_type" TEXT /* Type of biopsy performed (e.g., core needle biopsy, fine needle aspiration) */,
  "surgical_margin_status" TEXT /* Status of surgical margins after surgery (e.g., clear, positive) */,
  "lymph_node_status" TEXT /* Status of lymph nodes (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tumor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tumors_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient receiving the treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., surgery, chemotherapy, hormone therapy) */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment (if applicable) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "administered_by" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who administered the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the outcome belongs to */,
  "disease_free_survival" INTEGER /* Disease-free survival in months */,
  "overall_survival" INTEGER /* Overall survival in months */,
  "date_of_last_followup" TEXT /* Date of the last follow-up */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death if the patient has passed away */,
  "recurrence_status" TEXT /* Whether the cancer has recurred (e.g., yes, no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tumor_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "tumor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tumor the characteristic belongs to */,
  "tumor_type" TEXT /* Type of tumor (e.g., ductal, lobular, mixed) */,
  "receptor_status" TEXT /* Receptor status (e.g., ER+, PR+, HER2-) */,
  "ki67_index" TEXT /* Ki-67 index, which indicates the growth rate of the tumor */,
  "tnm_staging" TEXT /* TNM (Tumor, Node, Metastasis) staging information */,
  "genetic_mutations" TEXT /* Any genetic mutations identified in the tumor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tumor_characteristics_tumor_id FOREIGN KEY ("tumor_id") REFERENCES tumors ("tumor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tumor_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "tumor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tumor the image belongs to */,
  "image_file_name" TEXT /* File name of the image */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "image_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was taken */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., MRI, CT, X-ray) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tumor_images_tumor_id FOREIGN KEY ("tumor_id") REFERENCES tumors ("tumor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or unit of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the patient data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for additional context on the device and browser used */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_outcomes" (
  "treatment_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment outcome */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment the outcome belongs to */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the treatment (e.g., refractory, responsive) */,
  "disease_free_survival" INTEGER /* Disease-free survival in months */,
  "overall_survival" INTEGER /* Overall survival in months */,
  "date_of_evaluation" TEXT /* Date when the treatment outcome was evaluated */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Any side effects experienced by the patient due to the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)
